Times of Israel liveblog May 11

text: ESCALATION: Hezbollah fires record 105 attack waves on Israel — most intense day since ceasefire (avg 18.5/day prior week). IDF reservist Alexander Glovanyov (47) killed in drone strike. Golani soldier killed by anti-tank missile in Lebanon. Hezbollah footage shows drone hit Iron Dome battery. Hormuz Day 70.
